text:
Created attachment 222043
The Subversion patch for dMagnetic release 0.30

The changelog is:
dmagnetic (0.30-1) unstable; urgency=medium

  * Internal bugfixes
  * Fixed missing picture from 'Fish!' in C64 mode
  * New characters for the monochrome vmode

 -- Thomas Dettbarn <dettus@dettus.net>  Sun, 31 Jan 2021 14:47:30 +0100

As always, I took the liberty of creating a small patch and attached it to this bug report.
Please check if it meets your standards
